title: arum gracile
intro: Arum gracile, also known as the slender arum or Malabar arrowroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Arum family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Arum gracile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and powders, and it is also used in some traditional remedies and supplements.
